summarize-file.allowed_use: Summarize a single file for the controller to quickly understand its purpose and structure.
summarize-file.forbidden_use: Must not claim completeness or correctness of the file.

summarize-tree.allowed_use: Summarize a directory tree to help the controller navigate the project.
summarize-tree.forbidden_use: Must not skip files silently; must note what was excluded.

extract-todos.allowed_use: Extract TODO, FIXME, HACK, XXX comments from source files.
extract-todos.forbidden_use: Must not invent TODOs that are not in the source.

find-related-files.allowed_use: Given a query or file, suggest related files in the project.

generate-test-plan.allowed_use: Draft a test plan covering normal, boundary, and error paths.
generate-test-plan.forbidden_use: Must not claim tests already pass. Must not write final test code.

generate-test-draft.allowed_use: Draft test skeleton code for the controller to review and finalize.
generate-test-draft.forbidden_use: Must not claim the draft is complete or passing.

review-diff.allowed_use: Review a git diff for candidate bugs, risks, and test gaps.
review-diff.forbidden_use: Must not approve changes. Must not claim tests pass.

deep-code-review.allowed_use: Deep review of code for architectural issues, patterns, and risks.
deep-code-review.forbidden_use: Must not approve changes. Controller must verify all claims.

architecture-review.allowed_use: Compare architectural approaches and flag tradeoffs.
architecture-review.forbidden_use: Must not make final architecture decisions.

release-risk-review.allowed_use: Pre-release risk review. Check for breaking changes, missing tests, unhandled edge cases, and security regressions.
release-risk-review.forbidden_use: Must not approve or block release. Controller makes final call.

risk-analysis.allowed_use: Analyze failure modes, worst cases, and overlooked edge cases.
risk-analysis.forbidden_use: Must not approve or reject. Controller makes final call.

logic-check.allowed_use: Check logical consistency and identify contradictions.
logic-check.forbidden_use: Must not claim certainty on ambiguous logic.

failure-mode-analysis.allowed_use: Enumerate ways a plan or code could fail.

translate-text.forbidden_use: Must not translate secrets, credentials, or access tokens.

rewrite-text.forbidden_use: Must not alter meaning of technical specifications.

debate-review-diff.allowed_use: Multi-model cross-review of a git diff. Three rounds: coder, reasoning, deep reviewer.
debate-review-diff.forbidden_use: Must not approve changes. Must not claim tests pass. Controller makes final call.

debate-risk-analysis.allowed_use: Multi-model cross-review of risk analysis. Multiple models challenge each other's reasoning.
debate-risk-analysis.forbidden_use: Must not approve or reject. Controller makes final call.

debate-architecture-review.allowed_use: Multi-model architecture review comparing approaches and flagging tradeoffs.
debate-architecture-review.forbidden_use: Must not make final architecture decisions.

debate-failure-mode-analysis.allowed_use: Multi-model failure mode analysis. Models enumerate and challenge each other's failure scenarios.
